class.name: Craftsman
class.description: Craftsmen are virtuosoartisans and genius inventors. Not content merely creating masterwork pieces ofweapons and armor, they invent and engineer ingenious devices and singularlydeadly weapons.

starting_equipment.items: Chain Mail, Shield, Warhammer, 6 Light Hammers,Explorer’s Pack, and 18 GP
Studded LeatherArmor, 2 Shortswords, Heavy Crossbow, 20 Bolts, Crossbow Bolt Case, Explorer’sPack, and 13 GP

class_features.name: Expert Crafting
class_features.description: You gain a set ofCrafting Tools (usable as any Artisan's Tools). You gain Instant Crafting(Utilize action to retrieve nonmagical gear up to 50 GP) and Overnight Crafting(craft nonmagical items during Long Rest with GP limit of level x 10).

class_features.name: Masterwork
class_features.description: You can improve weapons andarmor into Masterwork versions over 2 hours. Masterwork Weapons gain a bonus toattack and damage rolls (+1 at level 1, increasing to +4 at level 17).Masterwork Armor grants a +1 bonus to AC.

class_features.name: WeaponMastery
class_features.description: You can use the mastery properties of two kinds ofSimple or Martial weapons. You can change one choice whenever you finish a LongRest.

class_features.name: Customize Weapon
class_features.description: After a LongRest, you can spend 50+ GP to modify a weapon's mastery property, replace it, oradd a second property (which only you can use).

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: You gain a Fighting Style feat of your choice.You can replace it whenever you gain a Craftsman level.

class_features.name: Craftsman Subclass
class_features.description: You gain a Craftsman subclass ofyour choice, granting features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: You gain the Ability ScoreImprovement feat or another feat for which you qualify. You gain this featureagain at levels 8, 12, and 16.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take theAttack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Folded Steel
class_features.description: When you modify a weapon with Customize Weapon, you can changeits damage type to Bludgeoning, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Piercing, or Slashing.

class_features.name: Customize Armor
class_features.description: After a Long Rest,spend 100+ GP to add a benefit to armor: Cast-Off, Climbing, Diving, Integrated(weapon/shield), or Sleek (no Stealth disadvantage).

class_features.name: Fortify Arsenal
class_features.description: During a Short Rest, you can Hone Weapons(Advantage on next attack) or Reinforce Armor (Resistance to physical damageuntil hit) for up to five items.

class_features.name: Eye for Quality
class_features.description: You can cast Identify and Locate Object without a spell slot orcomponents. Identify also reveals market value.

class_features.name: Weapon Enchantment
class_features.description: Place an enchantment on a Masterworkweapon: Blessed, Elemental, Vampiric, or Venomous. Only you gain the benefits.

class_features.name: Armor Enchantment
class_features.description: Place anenchantment on Masterwork armor: Adamantine, Cloaking, Resistance, or Winged.Only you gain the benefits.

class_features.name: Fabrication
class_features.description: You can cast Fabricate without a spell slot or components usingIntelligence.

class_features.name: Improved Enchantment
class_features.description: Each of your Weapon Enchantments deals two extra dice of damage on a hitinstead of one.

class_features.name: Spellwrought Armor
class_features.description: While wearing Masterwork armor, you can add your Masterwork Bonus to savingthrows.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: You gain an EpicBoon feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify.

class_features.name: Magnum Opus
class_features.description: Create one Very Rare orLegendary magic item over 30 days. You are instantly attuned, it doesn't countagainst limits, and you can call it to your hand as a Bonus Action.

features.name: Arcane Apprenticeship
features.description: Learn True Strike and twoWizard cantrips using Intelligence.

features.name: Magic ItemCrafting
features.description: You can craft specific magic items during Long Rests.GP limit increases to level x 25.

features.name: Arcane Strike
features.description: Replace one attack with a Wizard cantrip or the Magic action touse a magic item.

features.name: Sever Connection
features.description: Reaction: End attunement to an item to gain an AC bonus equal to Intelligencemodifier until your next turn.

features.name: Magic Item Recharge
features.description: Recharge magic items equal to Intelligence modifier after aShort Rest. Once per Long Rest.

features.name: Armored Slam
features.description: Replace an attack with abody slam (5ft range). Target makes Strength save or takes Bludgeoning damageequal to your AC.

features.name: Masterwork Shield
features.description: Improve a Shield to Masterwork (+1 AC bonus).

features.name: Shining Steel
features.description: On Initiative, challenge creatures within 30ft.They must save or have Disadvantage on attacks against others.

features.name: Fortify
features.description: Bonus Action: Gain AC bonusequal to Str/Dex modifier and Resistance to all damage until next turn. Usesequal to Masterwork Bonus.

features.name: Colossal Slam
features.description: Armored Slam deals extra 2d10 Force damage and knocks targetsProne.

features.name: Weapon Versatilist
features.description: Once per turn, gain Advantage onan attack roll. Cannot use again with that specific weapon type until Initiativeor Rest.

features.name: Bane Weapons
features.description: Etch a runeof slaying on a melee weapon against a specific creature type for extra 1d10Force damage.

features.name: Flex Grip
features.description: Reachis 5ft greater with Masterwork Two-Handed or Versatile melee weapons on yourturn.

features.name: Defensive Disarm
features.description: Reaction:Attempt to disarm a creature within 5ft that attacks you. Target makes Strengthsave.

features.name: Vicious Strike
features.description: Whenattacking with Advantage, you can take Disadvantage instead to score a CriticalHit on a hit.

features.name: Exotic Ammunition
features.description: Create special ammo(Armor-Piercing, Dragon's Breath, Drilling, Flechette) after a Long Rest.

features.name: Zeroed Sights
features.description: Ranged attacks withMasterwork weapons ignore Half and Three-Quarters Cover.

features.name: Magazine
features.description: Modify ranged weapons to have the Reloadproperty, allowing multiple attacks before needing a Bonus Action/Action toreload.

features.name: Suppressive Fire
features.description: Once perturn on ranged hit, target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll.

features.name: Stopping Power
features.description: Treat any damage die on aMasterwork Ranged weapon as at least half the maximum value.

features.name: Portable Forge
features.description: Gain Fire Resistance, learn Mending/Produce Flame, and weaponscan deal Fire damage. Highest fire damage dice explode (Flare Damage).

features.name: Explosive Armory
features.description: Add the Explode propertyto any weapon dealing Fire damage.

features.name: Scorching Steel
features.description: Reaction: Deal 2d10 Fire damage to a creature within 5ft thathits you while wearing Masterwork armor.

features.name: FireBurst
features.description: Cast Fireball centered on yourself (no damage to self).Uses equal to Masterwork Bonus.

features.name: Mechanaut’s Apparatus
features.description: Build and pilot a Large construct tank. It has its own stats, integratedweapons, and provides Total Cover to the pilot.

features.name: Cockpit Upgrade
features.description: Choose one: Floodlights, Loudspeaker, orPassenger Seat.

features.name: Frame Upgrade
features.description: Choose one: Arachnotron Legs (Climb), Diving Bell (Swim/Air), or HeavySuspension (Jump/Fall).

features.name: Ejector Seat
features.description: Reaction: Eject yourself and passengers 30ft when takingdamage.

features.name: Magitech Upgrade
features.description: Chooseone: Ballista Cannon, Missile Pod, or Rocket Engine.

features.name: Power Cell
features.description: Gain Lightning Resistance and Charge Points (equal to level).Use points to deal extra Lightning damage (Shock).

features.name: Electric Armory
features.description: Add the Jolt property to any weapon. ArcingJolt allows electricity to leap to a second target.

features.name: Static Charge
features.description: Bonus Action: Charge Masterwork armor. Nextcreature to hit you with melee takes 3d6 Lightning damage.

features.name: Ball Lightning
features.description: Bonus Action: Spend 3 points to createa plasma ball that moves and charges metallic weapons for extra 1d6 Lightningdamage.

features.name: Danger Sense
features.description: Advantage on Dexterity saving throws.

features.name: Traps
features.description: Craft and deploy traps (BallBearings, Caltrops, Hunting Trap, etc.) as a Bonus Action. Uses equal to level.

features.name: Booby Trap
features.description: Conceal traps. Concealedtraps deal double damage dice.

features.name: Escape Plan
features.description: Reaction: Move your speed and deploy a trap when an enemy moveswithin 5ft. Uses equal to Masterwork Bonus.

features.name: RapidDeployment
features.description: Utilize action to deploy up to three traps atonce.
